title: An Act to Provide Winter Access to the Bog Lake Public Boat Launch in Northfield
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, May 27, 2025
last_house_action: 4/8/2025 - The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on INLAND FISHERIES AND WILDLIFE . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 5/27/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)

actions.description: Committee on INLAND FISHERIES AND WILDLIFE suggested and ordered printed REFERENCE to the Committee on INLAND FISHERIES AND WILDLIFE Ordered sent down forthwith for concurrence
The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on INLAND FISHERIES AND WILDLIFE . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
